Flow.description: Creates/updates SCM configuration for Spend Management ICP, Currency, Warehouse and Address (Single Currency Org)
Flow.label: SM Create Spend Management Configuration

fields.name: Confirm
fields.fieldText: An ICP and a single warehouse have been created/updated with the company address.

fields.name: txtNoCurrencyFound_0
fields.fieldText: Company {!varCompanyName} has a home currency of {!varHomeCurrencyISOCode}. This does not yet exist for use in Spend Management so will now be created.

fields.name: txtCNX18
fields.fieldText:
By default we take the ICP Name from the Company. However the combined ICP & Warehouse names are used to create a Salesforce Queue, and the name of this cannot exceed 36 characters.

As the company name ({!varCompanyName}) is longer than 18 characters the default combined ICP + Warehouse name will exceed this.

It is recommended to keep the ICP Name to 18 characters or fewer; to continue with a longer name (of less than 36 characters) check the override option.

fields.name: txtCNX36
fields.fieldText:
By default we take the ICP Name from the Company. However the combined ICP & Warehouse names are used to create a Salesforce Queue, and the name of this cannot exceed 36 characters.

As the company name ({!varCompanyName}) is longer than 36 characters the ICP name needs to be abbreviated or changed.

Please enter a revised name to use for the ICP here. It is recommended to keep this to 18 characters or fewer.

fields.name: txtNoCurrencyFound
fields.fieldText: Company {!varCompanyName} does not yet have a home currency specified. Without this Spend Management configuration cannot proceed. Please check the FinancialForce Accounting configuration then retry.

fields.name: IntroSCMOrgCC
fields.fieldText:
One currency must be set as the organisational default for SCM/Spend Management. This can be done later, but must be done before Supplier Accounts are created for Purchase Orders.

To set an organisation currency now choose the currency currency here and confirm it as the organisational default.

fields.name: ConfirmORGCC
fields.fieldText: Confirm selected currency as SCM Organisational Currency

fields.name: txtCNX18_0
fields.fieldText: The combined ICP and Warehouse Name cannot exceed 36 characters; the ICP name is {!varICPName}, so please abbreviate or amend the Warehouse name to fit inside this restriction.
